mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hotels WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotels (name, cover_image, images, region, address, latitude, longitude, star_level, hotel_type, price, description, facilities, room_types, check_in_time, check_out_time, phone, payment_qr_code, tags, rating, is_recommended, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{coverImage}, #{images}, #{region}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{starLevel}, #{hotelType}, #{price}, #{description}, #{facilities}, #{roomTypes}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{phone}, #{paymentQrCode}, #{tags}, #{rating}, #{isRecommended}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE hotels SET name = #{name}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, images = #{images}, region = #{region}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, star_level = #{starLevel}, hotel_type = #{hotelType}, price = #{price}, description = #{description}, facilities = #{facilities}, room_types = #{roomTypes}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, phone = #{phone}, payment_qr_code = #{paymentQrCode}, tags = #{tags}, rating = #{rating}, is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hotels SET is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
